context_text: <A> [ yeah well ] when i get you know when we like say we make swedish meat balls at home / <B> okay / <A> we'll end up buying enough stuff to make like five pounds worth of swedish meat balls / <B> right / <A> so we can eat it for like four or five days between me my wife and out son / <B> mhm / <A> you know that way it's cheaper to buy in bulk than it is to just buy like one pound of meat when you can buy a big five pound thing and get the discount so / <B> mhm / <A> so we end up just usually buying in bulk i'll { end } / <B> [ okay ]
